description: IDC deterministic-core hooks (v4). SessionEnd: the recirculation-intake safety-net sweep (re-stages rogue Buildables, captures untickered discovery/deferral markers). SubagentStop: the verdict gate — a review agent cannot stop without a validated verdict JSON at docs/workflow/code-reviews/ (bounded N=3, then loud-fail). Both are repo-gated (no-op outside an IDC-governed repo) and fail-soft; auto-discovered, so NEVER also listed in plugin.json (the 3.1.1 duplicate-hooks regression).
